awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: ⚡ A curated list of awesome Svelte resources
awesomeListMeta.description: ⚡ A curated list of awesome Svelte resources

nodes.itemHTML: • svelte-uniconsstars1 - Unicons svg icons for Svelte based on @iconscout/unicons.
• create-vite - Generates scaffold for a vite + svelte app.
• create-svelte - A CLI for creating a new SvelteKit project.
• Capacitor - Build native mobile apps with web technology and Svelte.
• Svelte UI - SvelteUI is an all inclusive Svelte library.
• @shaun/svelterouterstars1 - Another vue-router inspired Svelte router.
• @danielsharkov/svelte-routerstars7 - A simple & easy to use SPA router, developed with page transitions in mind.
• svelte-icomoonstars3 - It makes it very simple to use SVG icons in your Svelte projects.
• svelte-switch-casestars74 - Switch case syntax for Svelte.
• ionic-sveltestars323 - Svelte integration with Ionic's UI for mobile app development, including many starters.
• svelte-french-toaststars158 - Buttery smooth toast notifications for Svelte, inspired by React Hot Toast. Lightweight, customizable, and beautiful by default.
• AutoAnimate - A zero-config, drop-in animation utility that adds smooth transitions to your Svelte app.
• svelte-formlystars208 - A good solution to generate and control a dynamic forms using core and custom rules with customize styles.
• svelte-frappe-chartsstars223 - Svelte bindings for frappe-charts.
• AgnosticUIstars510 - Accessible Svelte Component Primitives (that also work with React, Vue 3, and Angular).
• svelte-fluentstars44 - Components for easy integration of Fluent localization.
• svelte-i18nstars812 - Internationalization library for Svelte.
• sveltekit-i18nstars166 - For integrating i18n style localization in SvelteKit.
• @tolgee/svelte - Web-based localization tool enabling users to translate directly in the Svelte app they develop.
• svelte-copyrightstars10 - A Svelte component to format and display a copyright notice.
• svelte-flexstars67 - A simple and reusable flexbox component for Svelte.
• svelte-heroiconsstars6 - Icons, crafted by the creators of Tailwind CSS.
• felte - Extensible form library, with built-in Yup, Zod, Vest, and Superstruct validation.
• veststars2k - 🦺 Declarative form validation framework inspired by unit testing.
• @zerodevx/svelte-toaststars409 - Simple elegant toast notifications.
• Create your blog with SvelteKit - @zhuzilin (Github).
• svelte-tree-viewerstars13 - A lightweight component to render tree views.
• svelte-typewriterstars201 - A simple and reusable typewriter effect for your Svelte applications.
• svelte-web-fonts/googlestars13 - Tiny component for easily loading Fonts via the Google Fonts API including autocompletion.
• Sveltestrapstars1k - Bootstrap 4 & 5 components.
• svelte-docsterstars7 - Generate metadata about your Svelte files from jsdoc.
• Svelte Native - Svelte controlling native components via Nativescript.
• Framework7 - Full featured HTML framework for building iOS & Android apps.
• SvelteKit - The fastest way to build Svelte apps.
• svelte-grid-responsivestars41 - Bootstrap-inspired responsive grid system.
• svelte-forms-libstars521 - A lightweight library for managing forms.
• svelthreestars371 - Component library for declarative construction of reactive and reusable three.js scene graphs.
• svelte-portalstars259 - Component for rendering outside the DOM of parent component.
• svelte-teleportstars20 - A component to teleport elements across the DOM.
• svelte-router-spastars436 - Router adds routing to your Single Page Applications (SPA). Includes localisation, guards and nested layouts.
• svelte-routingstars1.7k - A declarative Svelte routing library with SSR support.
• tinrostars635 - A tiny, dependency free and highly declarative router.
• svelte-spa-routerstars1.2k - Optimized for Single Page Applications (SPA) with hash based routing and support for parameters.
• svelte-client-routerstars12 - Svelte Client Router is everything you need and think when routing SPA's.
• Elder.js - Opinionated static site generator and web framework for Svelte built with SEO in mind.
• Routify - Routes for Svelte, automated by your file structure.
• JungleJS - The Jamstack framework for Svelte with GraphQL.
• Meet Svelte 3, a Powerful, Even Radical JavaScript Framework - SitePoint, by Chrome DevTools engineer @Jack_Franklin.
• svelte-generic-crud-tablestars42 - Agnostic web-component for object-arrays with CRUD functionality. Sort and resize columns. Multiple tables per page.
• svelte-generic-table-pagerstars4 - Svelte-generic-crud-table with paginator.
• Sapper Tutorial (Crash Course) - The Net Ninja (YouTube).
• Svelte 101 - @lihautan (YouTube).
• eslint-plugin-sveltestars50 - An ESLint plugin for Svelte using AST.
• Learn Svelte by building a habit tracker app - RadDevon.
• svelte-chotastars272 - Component library built with Chota, a super light-weight CSS framework
• Svelte Stores - @lihautan (YouTube).
• Svelte Actions - @lihautan (YouTube).
• svelte-simple-datatablesstars203 - A Datatable component for Svelte
• JavaScript Frameworks Performance Comparison - Performance of Svelte and other top javascript frameworks.
• Svelte Mastery
• svelte-preprocessstars1.4k - A preprocessor for PostCSS, SCSS, Less, Stylus, Coffeescript, TypeScript, Pug and much more.
• Japan Discord - Svelte日本.
• Develop a complete application with Svelte and TypeScript - MDN Web Docs.

• SvelteJS Series - tutorials and talks - SpinSpire (YouTube).
• SvelteScaling - Does Svelte Scale?
• Will it Scale?stars153 - Finding Svelte's inflection point.
• component-templatestars515 - A base for building shareable components.
• svelte-pwa-templatestars186 - A starter template for PWAs based in the official Template.
• attractionsstars726 - A pretty cool and modern UI kit
• svelte-simple-iconsstars13 - Simple Icons component.
• svelte-awesomestars323 - Awesome SVG icon component, built with Font Awesome icons.
• MDSveXstars1.5k - Preprocessor for MDX markdown.
• svelte-preprocess-lessstars13 - Preprocessor for less.
• modular-css - Preprocessor support for modular-css.
• svelte-preprocess-sassstars90 - Preprocessor for sass.
• Smeltestars1.4k - UI framework with material components built with Tailwind CSS.
• Svelte Material UIstars2.6k - Material UI Components.
• svelte-tablestars358 - A table implementation that allows sorting and filtering.
• svelte-notificationsstars286 - Toast notifications component that can be used in any JS application.
• svelte-fastars251 - Tiny FontAwesome 5 component.
• svelte-iconsstars201 - Icon components.
• svelte-fullcalendarstars146 - A component wrapper around FullCalendar.
• svelte-googlemapsstars58 - Google Maps component.
• svelte-mapboxstars240 - MapBox map and autocomplete components.
• leaflet-sveltestars48 - Svelte wrapper for Leaflet.
• svelte-checkboxstars72 - A checkbox component (cool animation, customizable).
• svelte-togglestars19 - Basic toggle component with styling.
• eslint-plugin-svelte3stars338 - An ESLint plugin for components.
• prettier-plugin-sveltestars496 - Format your components using prettier.
• svelte-check - Check your code.
• sveltedoc-parserstars80 - Generate a JSON documentation for your component.
• svelte-jesterstars119 - A Jest transformer to compile your components before importing them into tests.
• Svelte for VS Code - Provides syntax highlighting and rich intellisense for your components.
• ide-svelte - Provides syntax highlighting and rich intellisense for your components.
• language-svelte - Provides syntax highlighting for components, directives and other Svelte specific syntax in Atom.
• Svelte - Syntax highlighting and support for Sublime Text.
• vim-svelte-pluginstars100 - Syntax highlighting and support for Vim.
• coc-sveltestars150 - Syntax highlighting and support for (Neo)Vim.
• Svelte - Syntax highlighting and support for JetBrains.
• Getting Started with Svelte 3 - DigitalOcean.
• Building My First Svelte App - Scotch.io.
• An Introduction to Actions - Svelte School.
• Svelte Tutorial for Beginners - The Net Ninja (YouTube).
• @testing-library/sveltestars522 - Simple and complete Svelte DOM testing utilities that encourage good testing practices.

• svelte-preprocess-markdownstars123 - Write Svelte components in markdown syntax.
• svelte-preprocess-postcssstars24 - Use PostCSS to preprocess your styles in Svelte components.
• carbon-components-sveltestars1.8k - Svelte implementation of the IBM Carbon Design System.
• svelte-favicon-badgestars93 - A custom component that adds a favicon and a badge that you can use to show for example number of unread messages, etc.
• svelte-calendarstars468 - A lightweight datepicker with neat animations and a unique UX.
• svelte-docsstars159 - A rapid way to write documentation for your Svelte components.
• jest-transform-sveltestars36 - Jest Transformer for Svelte components.
